transcription.text: Memories follow me left and right I can feel you over here, I can feel you over here You take up every corner of my mind What you gonna do now? Ever since the day you, you went away No I don't know how How to erase your body from out my brain What you gonna do now? Maybe I should just focus on me instead Of all I think of
